# ChinaHack

> Mentorship and scholarship-application guidance for students pursuing university scholarships in China.

ChinaHack helps students evaluate their profile, build a scholarship strategy, and prepare applications with mentor support.

## Site

- [Homepage (English)](https://chinahack.revonexus.net/en)
- [Homepage (Tiếng Việt)](https://chinahack.revonexus.net/vi)
- [Homepage (中文)](https://chinahack.revonexus.net/zh)
- [Blog posts](https://chinahack.revonexus.net/en/posts)
- [Sitemap](https://chinahack.revonexus.net/sitemap.xml)
